summary: GitHub issue planning — analyze repos, plan work, create and track issues.

entry.use_when: Starting any planning, analysis, or issue-management workflow

subcommands.use_when: User wants to see what is already tracked
User wants to draft or submit a single issue quickly
User wants to build or refresh project docs before planning
First-time setup or re-configuring the GitHub repo
GitHub authentication is failing or needs to be refreshed
